report.summary: All 6 API routes structurally healthy with proper caching; 2 new learn guides built today but not yet committed; P0 blocker persists — Day 9+ without production deploy, 69 uncommitted files.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: Latest commit (Apr 1): build fix removing 'use client' from 4 learn pages that export metadata — Vercel build regression resolved
2 new learn guides scaffolded today (crypto-trading-bots, blockchain-oracles) but page.tsx files use different slugs than build report — slug mismatch needs reconciliation before publish
109 of 628 published slugs still missing page.tsx files — long-standing debt, not a new regression
1,242 total page.tsx files on disk vs 628 in PUBLISHED_PAGES — 614 pages built but not yet published
2 pages remain in PUBLISH_QUEUE: euler-v2-modular-lending, hyperlane-permissionless-interoperability
No new build regressions detected since last cycle's 'use client' fix

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present: prices (60s TTL), trending (300s), fear-greed (600s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (cached)
Cache-Control headers properly set with stale-while-revalidate on all routes
Rate limiter exists at src/lib/rate-limiter.ts
WARNING: Only prices and market-dominance have hardcoded FALLBACK_DATA — trending, fear-greed, and defi-yields would fail ungracefully if both cache and API are down
Live API health check not possible this cycle (egress proxy blocks external API domains from sandbox)

sections.title: DevOps
items: P0 BLOCKER: Day 9+ without production deploy — last deploy unknown, last commit Apr 1 15:40 UTC+2
69 uncommitted files in working tree — includes modified learn pages, reports, skill files, and published-pages.ts changes
Degen0x workspace (/mnt/Degen0x) still has no git repository initialized
Latest commit was a valid build fix (3b2dd28) — should produce clean Vercel build if deployed
Cannot verify live Vercel deployment status from sandbox (degen0x.com egress blocked)

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Today's output: 2 commits, 4 build cycles, 4 community cycles, 2 design cycles, 3 standup cycles, 20 agent runs
Content velocity: 30 learn pages on disk (+4 since last standup), 21,177 total lines (+14.1%)
Carry-over: 69 uncommitted files need commit + deploy, 2 publish queue pages need promotion, slug mismatches on 2 new guides need fixing

Blockers needing Jefe's attention: (1) Production deploy overdue — 9+ days of accumulated changes, (2) 69-file uncommitted backlog growing, (3) Slug mismatch on today's trading bots and oracles guides
